title: Demon
overview: Musashi Miyamoto receives the Oni Gauntlet for 33 days — along with a reluctant chaperone to watch over the precious item.

title: Mountain Demon
overview: The men arrive in the village, but it seems to be abandoned. While exploring the area, they come across a little girl who's all on her own.

title: Nightmare
overview: While leading the men to lemon's fortress, Sayo notices that there's something strange about the path that they're taking.

title: Bewitch
overview: The men arrive at the mountain temple and are confronted by three masked figures. While Musashi fights them, Kaizen, Sahei and Heikuro try to save Sayo.

title: Yin Soul
overview: The Yoshioka family isn't through with Musashi and his men yet. With Sayo suffering from a fever, Sahei leaves to forage for medicinal herbs.

title: Oni
overview: A strange man named Alfred welcomes Musashi and his friends into the lavish golden mountain before politely — but firmly — asking them to join Iemon.

title: Harbinger
overview: Years ago, Kensuke Matsuki acknowledged his young disciple's abilities, giving him the name Iemon and joining him in his wicked ambitions.

title: Yang Soul
overview: While escaping with Sayo, Sahei comes across Iemon, who begs and barters with him to save his life. Then, the third traitor reveals themselves.
